title: eriophorum cyperinum f. brachypodum
intro: Eriophorum cyperinum f. brachypodum, also known as the short-stemmed cotton-grass or short-stemmed cotton sedge, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Eriophorum cyperinum f. brachypodum include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe skin irritations, and aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis. The plant is commonly prepared as a tincture or tea, and is also used in infusions and salves to harness its medicinal properties.
